summary: A plugin-based monolith system called GOrchestra currently undergoing a documentation-driven rewrite from its original language to Go.
concerns: active Go rewrite indicates potential instability in current codebase
scattered configuration across .claude/, .gorchestra/, and config/ directories
heavy documentation focus with recent commits being entirely docs-related
uncommitted changes (3 modified, 1 staged) during a rewrite phase
suggestions: consolidate configuration directories to reduce fragmentation
prioritize completing the Go rewrite over adding new features
establish a clear migration path from legacy code to Go implementation
address uncommitted changes before continuing rewrite work
